name: Restricted Content Downloader
description: Download restricted photos, videos, and documents from Telegram private chats/channels.

BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot token jo @BotFather ne diya hai.

SESSION_STRING.description: Pyrogram Session String (@TgDevToolBot se nikaal lena).

FORWARD_CHAT_ID.description: Optional: Jahan content forward karna hai (Example: -1001234567890). Khali chhodd de agar nahi chahiye.
